store-read.rule: Read upstream rows through the published store classes — CompositionStore.resolveComposition (@adhd/agent-registry), ToolBindingStore.resolve / AgentToolStore.listForAgent (@adhd/agent-tool-registry), ModelStore.resolveModelId / ToolFormatStore.getShape (@adhd/agent-provider), AgentPolicyStore.listForAgent / PolicyTemplateStore.read (@adhd/agent-policy) — over ONE shared better-sqlite3 handle. Do NOT re-implement ORDER BY position or the context evaluator; delegate to resolveComposition.

compile-agent.rule: The public surface is compileAgent({agentSlug, platform, context, db}) returning { id, content, tools, componentVersions } — mirroring the USAGE.md 'Runtime Integration via agent-mcp' snippet (composed.content / composed.tools / composed.id / composed.componentVersions). claude_code emits yaml_frontmatter markdown; claude_api emits a json_object. agent-mcp (plan 6) consumes this exact return shape at session start.

cli-bin.rule:
The compile CLI bin mirrors agent-mcp's bin entry in package.json; it parses compile --platform

[--context '{...}'] [--format json] [--out-dir ] [--all --category ] [--db ] and writes markdown to stdout (or files under --out-dir), exiting non-zero on unknown slug/platform. The migration round-trip gate (plan 7) drives this real bin.
